description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house surrounded by a tall hedge, featuring a spacious front yard with a long driveway leading to a detached garage. The main building has a flat roof with large windows, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property includes multiple outdoor living spaces, such as patios, decks, and a pool area, all integrated with landscaped gardens and trees. The rear of the house opens to a wide backyard with additional seating and recreational areas. The house is constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and wood, with visible metal railings and accents. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and clean, geometric lines.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, landscaped gardens, and multiple outdoor living spaces, surrounded by a tall hedge and featuring a detached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide driveway, detached garage, and landscaped front yard with trees and a dock-like platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side garden, and the extensive use of glass and flat roof sections.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, large windows, outdoor seating areas, and the full enclosure by the hedge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side garden, pool area, and the connection between the house and the garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide staircase, modern door, and a covered porch with minimalistic landscaping and no ornate columns.
